key_risks: Hawkish FOMC dot-plot or Powell tone on 6/17 could spike yields and hit growth/semis hardest
Momentum and semiconductor crowding makes the book vulnerable to a sharp factor reversal
Hot retail sales (6/17) or sticky energy CPI could reignite inflation fears
Concentration in high-beta tech and small caps amplifies any broad risk-off move

portfolio.rationale: Strongest momentum in the universe (+8.82% 7d, +75% 6m); cooling core CPI and falling yields support growth/tech leadership into FOMC.
Top broad factor with persistent trend (+5.85% 7d); benefits from soft-landing tape and declining VIX.
Rate relief (2Y down to 4.05%, 10Y to 4.45%) and risk-on breadth favor small caps; strong 7d/30d momentum.
Semiconductor export strength and global electronics demand; strong trailing returns with constructive risk appetite.
Mega-cap growth leadership aided by falling yields and benign inflation print ahead of FOMC hold.

portfolio_rationale: Cooling core inflation, falling Treasury yields, low VIX, and a near-certain FOMC hold support a risk-on tilt toward momentum and growth/semiconductor leadership for the one-week window.
rationale_summary: Lean into the strongest trending risk assets (semis, momentum, small caps) supported by disinflation and lower rates into the June FOMC.
